allies.rationale_text: Authenticity helps non-violent-communication surface real experience and tension instead of keeping the exchange in impression-management mode.
allies.source_quote: being authentic with this person now

allies.rationale_text: Critical-thinking helps non-violent-communication stress-test claims while still protecting the relationship enough for synthesis.
allies.source_quote: This model necessitates critical thinking to challenge assumptions and uncover truth.

antagonists.rationale_text: Authority-bias undermines non-violent-communication when role power suppresses direct observation-and-needs exchange.
antagonists.source_quote: non-violent-communication conflicts with authority-bias (authority bias) when role power suppresses direct needs-and-observations exchange.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias blocks non-violent-communication when people cling to their interpretation instead of staying open to revision.
antagonists.source_quote: non-violent-communication conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when rigid adherence to one's own interpretation blocks the open, non-judgmental listening that the model requires.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Non-violent-communication conflicts with confirmation-bias when rigid adherence to one's own interpretation blocks the open, non-judgmental listening that the model requires.
structured_tensions.source_quote: non-violent-communication vs confirmation-bias: non-violent-communication conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when rigid adherence to one's own interpretation blocks the open, non-judgmental listening that the model requires.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on authentic clarity, challenged assumptions, and two explicit current-vocabulary tension blocks against status and rigid interpretation.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor facilitation relation sprawl beyond the clean authenticity, scrutiny, and explicit tension surface.
open_questions: Commitment-and-consistency-bias is source-real too, but the retained set favors the stronger current-vocabulary authority and confirmation blocks.
